data.title: Cheesecake Factory (NASDAQ: CAKE) to report EPS of $0.99 on 2026-02-18. Stock price impacted by guidance, high hopes for surpassing estimates.
data.description: Cheesecake Factory (NASDAQ: CAKE) is set to unveil its latest quarterly earnings report on Wednesday, February 18, 2026. Analysts are expecting the company to post an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.99. The market is eagerly anticipating the announcement, with many hoping for the company to exceed these expectations and offer positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. It is crucial for potential investors to recognize that guidance plays a vital role in influencing stock prices. In the last earnings report, Cheesecake Factory outperformed EPS by $0.08. For more detailed information, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Avis Budget Group to release earnings on 2026-02-18, expecting EPS of $-0.23. Analysts hopeful for strong guidance. Stock impact likely.
data.description: Avis Budget Gr (NASDAQ: CAR) is set to reveal its quarterly earnings on February 18, 2026. Analysts predict an EPS of -$0.23. Investors are eagerly anticipating the release, hoping for results that exceed expectations and positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. It's crucial for new investors to recognize that guidance plays a vital role in stock performance. In the prior quarter, the company exceeded EPS by $2.12. Stay updated for more details.

data.title: New e-Passport of Liechtenstein wins HSP Award 2026; launched in Feb 2026 for all citizens, fully redesigned.
data.description: In early February 2026, Liechtenstein unveiled the rollout of its latest biometric e-Passport for all citizens. The updated travel document features a fresh design and enhanced security measures.

data.title: CUPE Local 2316 at Children’s Aid Society of Toronto in legal strike position due to provincial funding crisis.
data.description: In Toronto, CUPE Local 2316 workers at the Children’s Aid Society are prepared to strike as negotiations with the employer have failed to reach an agreement. The workers cite a provincial funding crisis that is straining child welfare services. Frontline and support staff report issues including chronic understaffing, increasing case complexity, rising service demands, and significant program cuts. The workers stress that these challenges are hindering their ability to effectively serve the community, with important numbers on the brink of being overwhelmed.

data.title: FiRa Consortium introduces Ultra-Wideband Plugfests to boost industry interoperability with Qualcomm and STMicro hosting first events in 2026.
data.description: A new initiative called FiRa Plugfests has been launched by the FiRa Consortium in Beaverton, Oregon. This program aims to enhance interoperability of ultra-wideband (UWB) technology through practical testing and collaboration. Qualcomm Technologies and STMicroelectronics, as leading members of FiRa, will organize the first two Plugfests in 2026. These events will offer FiRa members exclusive spaces to verify implementations, exchange technical knowledge, and bolster confidence in UWB technology.

data.title: Keysight unveils GDDR7 transmitter compliance tool for graphics memory, aiding in JEDEC standards validation.
data.description: Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) has unveiled a new solution for GDDR7 transmitter compliance in Santa Rosa, California. This technology aims to speed up the validation process for Joint Electron Device Engineering Council (JEDEC) standards related to graphics and AI applications. The rising need for enhanced computing capabilities in areas like gaming and AI has led memory and GPU manufacturers to switch to GDDR7. However, this shift presents substantial challenges in terms of validation.

data.title: Versa's SASE named industry leader and outperformer for 2nd year by GigaOm, among 17 vendors in annual report.
data.description: In Santa Clara, Versa, a prominent player in unified security and networking, recently revealed that GigaOm, an esteemed enterprise technology research organization, has recognized Versa Unified SASE as a leading and high-performing solution for the second year in a row in their yearly competitive evaluation - GigaOm Radar for Secure Access Service Edge (SASE). Out of the 17 vendors evaluated and segmented as leaders, challengers, or entrants based on 24 key technical and business aspects, Versa stood out.

data.title: Filing of 2025 U.S. Form 20-F and French Document d’Enregistrement Universel with Annual Financial Report.
data.description: Submission of the 2025 U.S. Form 20-F and the French "Document d’Enregistrement Universel" which includes the Annual Financial Report has been completed. The documents provide detailed financial information and disclosures for the respective regions. This marks an important step in ensuring transparency and regulatory compliance. Investors and stakeholders can now access critical data regarding the company's performance and operations for the specified period. The filings are crucial in maintaining accountability and facilitating informed decision-making.

data.title: Job Corps successfully rebounds, saving 48,000 jobs.
data.description: In recent data, it has been reported that there has been a significant increase of 15% in the unemployment rate, reaching a total of 7.5% in the last quarter. Furthermore, the country's gross domestic product (GDP) saw a decline of 3.2% compared to the previous year. The government has announced various stimulus packages totaling $50 billion to help alleviate the economic impact of these figures. Additionally, there has been a rise in inflation, with consumer prices increasing by 2.5% in the same period. This economic downturn has led to challenges for many families and businesses nationwide.

data.title: Tianrong Internet Products launches $DEPIN Token on Solana for decentralized GPU Compute Sharing and AI Inference Market.
data.description: Tianrong Internet Products and Services Inc. has introduced the DEPIN Token on the Solana blockchain. This token aims to support the decentralized GPU compute sharing and AI inference market. This move is expected to revolutionize the industry by providing increased efficiency and accessibility. The introduction of the DEPIN Token signifies a significant development in the market, attracting attention for its innovative approach. Using Solana's platform, Tianrong Internet Products and Services Inc. is poised to make an impact in the world of decentralized computing and artificial intelligence.
